mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, status, user_type, employee_id, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, real_name, email, phone, status, user_type, employee_id, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{userType}, #{employeeId}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, user_type = #{userType}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE users SET status = -1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{newPassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET real_name = #{realName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
